## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the client meeting agenda and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Migration Fix is Top Priority:** The client's incorrect canonical tags point all domains to `createanything.com`, undermining the migration to the primary `anything.com` domain. Fixing this is the most critical technical task.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Reporting is Blocked:** Organic-to-revenue reporting is impossible without GSC access and a GA4 setup that isolates traffic by domain. Kyle’s upcoming projections will be traffic-only until these are resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [**PSEO is a Strategic Option:** Programmatic SEO (PSEO) can deliver faster scale and higher conversion rates (per Lovable project data) but requires pausing editorial work and a significant upfront investment, which must be framed carefully.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**Meeting Strategy is Action-Oriented:** The team will lead with a concrete migration plan and roadmap to counter client frustration and maintain a productive, forward-looking discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO & Migration Issues

  - [The client's migration to the primary `anything.com` domain is stalled by critical technical errors.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**Incorrect Canonical Tags:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Problem:** All pages across all domains (e.g., `createanything.com`, `create.xyz`) point their canonicals to `createanything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Impact:** This sends Google conflicting signals, preventing the consolidation of authority on `anything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implement cross-domain canonicals pointing all non-homepage pages to their `anything.com` equivalent.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Content Duplication:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [New content is published simultaneously across all three domains, creating unnecessary duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [**Action:** Ask the client if future content can be published exclusively to `anything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Sitemap Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [All sitemaps now list `anything.com` URLs, which is technically functional for the migration but confusing.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize the canonical tag fix; the sitemap issue is a lower priority.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Reporting & Performance Measurement

  - [Organic-to-revenue reporting is blocked by two key issues:](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [**Missing GSC Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [Access to the `anything.com` GSC profile is required for accurate traffic projections and performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [**Flawed GA4 Setup:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [The current GA4 profile aggregates data from all three domains, making it impossible to isolate performance for `anything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Action:** Request a GA4 setup that allows domain-specific reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [**PostHog Discussion:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [The team will ask the client for a walkthrough of their PostHog setup to understand their current measurement framework.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Segment (a data pipeline) is not the reporting tool; PostHog is the visualization layer. Understanding their setup is crucial to proposing a viable organic-to-revenue reporting solution.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Strategic Options: PSEO vs. Editorial

  - [PSEO was discussed as a path to faster scale, but it requires careful framing.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**PSEO Benefits:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
      - [Higher conversion rates (per Lovable project data).](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
      - [Faster volume output once the initial setup is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [**PSEO Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [**Investment:** Requires pausing editorial work and a significant upfront investment (e.g., 3-4 weeks for a team of three on the Lovable project).](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
      - [**Expectation Management:** Must be framed as a strategic shift, not an add-on to the current scope.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [**Decision:** PSEO will be presented as a strategic option if the client pushes for faster scale.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

### Client Meeting Strategy

  - [The team will lead with a concrete, action-oriented plan to counter client frustration and maintain a productive discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)
  - [**Agenda Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
      - [**Migration Plan:** Present the canonical tag fix as the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Reporting Needs:** Clearly state the requirements for GSC access and a GA4 setup that isolates traffic by domain.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Roadmap:** Present Kyle's traffic-only projections and a potential PSEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Ongoing Work:** Briefly mention the steady cadence of editorial content production.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
  - [**Team Roles:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [**Katya:** Lead the meeting, focusing on the roadmap and action items.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [**Kyle:** Explain the technical details of the migration plan and reporting needs.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Erik:** Provide strategic context and acknowledge any past misalignments on expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
      - [Refine the client meeting agenda with the agreed-upon focus.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Check past call transcripts for mentions of PostHog.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [Complete traffic-only projections.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [Begin planning a more repeatable, migration-aware reporting structure.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)
      - [Maintain an action-oriented focus during the client meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/h4mceiLzoeVkQepL2yvb1G_-pzJSnsx2?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)
